title: An Act to repeal certain restrictions on shipping
fullText: C-264 1 45 3-4 Charles III 2025-2026 An Act to repeal certain restrictions on shipping An Act to repeal certain restrictions on shipping 2026 3 11 Mr. McKenzie 451151 SUMMARY This enactment repeals the Oil Tanker Moratorium Act . His Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows: 2019, c. 26 Oil Tanker Moratorium Act Repeal 1 The Oil Tanker Moratorium Act , chapter 26 of the Statutes of Canada, 2019, is repealed.

sections.text: Repeal 1 The Oil Tanker Moratorium Act , chapter 26 of the Statutes of Canada, 2019, is repealed.
